titles.title: Then I Found the Lily of the Valley

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I thought I had a bed of Roses Everything I did was on my own I thought the world was mine And everything was fine But I saw my roses wilt and fade away.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Then I found the Lily of the Valley In the shadow of the cross I saw Him bloom He took away my fears And wiped away my tears For the Lily of the Valley is my Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I saw the Lily of the Valley From a world of sin I tried to flee Oh everything went wrong It seemed that hope was gone Then the Lily of the Valley rescued me.
